reason: Verified agent functionality by sending a math question and confirming the correct response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Clicked on agent "QA-20260424-220654-yrle" in the sidebar - agent page opened with status "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" - requirement met (status was "idle")
Clicked on message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" - message entered successfully
Clicked Send message button - message sent, agent status changed to "working", activity indicator appeared
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - agent responded with "4" in approximately 1 second
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question
